title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare: Turning Point
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Perona, Luffy, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #22 as the scene develops across pages 12–15.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Perona, Luffy, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #11, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Are you one of Moria's men?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you were to go on vacation,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Where would you like to go?

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: What are you doing, asking... about...?

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: That's Lady Perona, without a doubt.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I got caught up in his pace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Your shadow must be extraordinarily strong, Kuma!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: That's right!! We'll never forgive you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: But we're also terrified!!! Run away!!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Perona, Luffy, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #11, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare: turning point.
